title: WikiBacklinksResult
description: Structured result of MetaprojectPort.wikiBacklinks — the wiki pages that reference a repo file (the reverse "documented in" lookup), backed by the gdwiki wikiPagesForFile facade (buildBacklinkIndex + backlinksFor).

file.description: The repo-relative file whose referencing wiki pages were computed.

backlinks.description: Repo-relative wiki page paths that reference `file`, sorted.

error.description: Set when the backing service failed — the result is structured-empty, not thrown.
